mapper.sql: k.id, k.category_id, k.name, k.description, k.unit, k.kpi_type, k.target_value, k.frequency, k.start_date, k.end_date, k.status, k.sort_order, k.owner_id, k.org_id, k.scope, k.created_at, k.updated_at, c.id AS cat_id, c.name AS cat_name, c.color AS cat_color, c.icon AS cat_icon, c.description AS cat_description, c.sort_order AS cat_sort_order
mapper.select: SELECT FROM kpi k LEFT JOIN category c ON k.category_id = c.id WHERE k.owner_id = #{ownerId} ORDER BY c.sort_order, k.sort_order, k.id
SELECT FROM kpi k LEFT JOIN category c ON k.category_id = c.id WHERE k.owner_id = #{ownerId} AND k.status = #{status} ORDER BY c.sort_order, k.sort_order, k.id
SELECT FROM kpi k LEFT JOIN category c ON k.category_id = c.id WHERE k.owner_id = #{ownerId} AND k.category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY k.sort_order, k.id
SELECT FROM kpi k LEFT JOIN category c ON k.category_id = c.id WHERE k.org_id = #{orgId} AND k.scope = 'TEAM' ORDER BY c.sort_order, k.sort_order, k.id
SELECT FROM kpi k LEFT JOIN category c ON k.category_id = c.id WHERE k.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kpi (category_id, name, description, unit, kpi_type, target_value, frequency, start_date, end_date, status, sort_order, owner_id, org_id, scope, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{unit}, #{kpiType}, #{targetValue}, #{frequency}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{status}, #{sortOrder}, #{ownerId}, #{orgId}, #{scope}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE kpi SET category_id = #{categoryId}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, unit = #{unit}, kpi_type = #{kpiType}, target_value = #{targetValue}, frequency = #{frequency}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, status = #{status}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, scope = #{scope}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE kpi SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kpi (id, category_id, name, description, unit, kpi_type, target_value, frequency, start_date, end_date, status, sort_order, owner_id, org_id, scope, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{categoryId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{unit}, #{kpiType}, #{targetValue}, #{frequency}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{status}, #{sortOrder}, #{ownerId}, #{orgId}, #{scope}, COALESCE(#{createdAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), COALESCE(#{updatedAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP))
